role: QA Automation Engineer / Tech Stack Lead
highlights: Authored, executed, and reviewed WebDriver code leveraging cloud infrastructure and mobile platform coverage to target HTML5 and Flash media players and an Angular CMS
Automated tests around the analytics, reporting, and ETL portions of the business
Created and administered synthetic tests using Dynatrace APM

Created a BDD test framework used across all products, a dynamic JavaScript test page which obsolesced a library of static test pages, and Ant and Gradle build scripts for dependency management and threaded execution of tests
Implemented a visual tool for tracking relational and constraint data in the database and created a browsable archive of page-load waterfall charts produced by performance tests
